creator: meka@tilda.center
text: Although it shouldn't change ALSA, OSS was added as an option. Can you check if you have media.cubeb.backend in your firefox about:config? If not, firefox is trying to use default driver (I'm not sure which one is that). If that config has value, only that driver will be used. You can set it to "oss" to use FreeBSD native driver.
